backend/main.mo: Actor defining profiles, needs, resources, events, memberships, and authorization helpers with storage maps and blob-storage integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing frontend requirements, affected files, components, and test IDs for membership-based profile loading and defensive error handling.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: List of short summaries for multiple frontend files describing UI components, hooks, and logic updates across the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML bootstrap file mounting the React root and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app router handling identity, profile/membership loading, join request routing, and onboarding fallback logic.
frontend/src/components/AdminMaintenance: Admin dashboard for searching, viewing, and deleting needs, resources, and events with category labels and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/ClubMemberManage: Dialog for managing profile members and join requests with role changes, additions, removals, and approval/denial actions.
frontend/src/components/DisplayNameDialo: Dialog for viewing and updating the user's display name with validation and loading states.
frontend/src/components/EventForm.tsx: Form for creating or editing events, including image upload, date/time handling, and resource category selection.
frontend/src/components/EventsPage.tsx: Page showing a calendar and event list with filtering, creation, editing, and deletion permissions.
frontend/src/components/ExchangeView.tsx: View that groups and displays needs and resources, highlighting matches for the current user and global matches.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer with branding and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/HaveForm.tsx: Form for posting a resource the user can offer, including category and description fields.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header with navigation, user menu, admin options, and a dialog trigger for editing display name.
frontend/src/components/MapView.tsx: Empty component file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/NeedForm.tsx: Form component allowing users to create a new need with category, description, and date range, submitting via createNeed mutation.
frontend/src/components/OrganizationProf: Dialog listing organization memberships and letting the user select which profile to view.
frontend/src/components/ProfileLoadFallb: Fallback card shown when a profile fails to load, offering retry and optional organization selection.
frontend/src/components/ProfileView.tsx: Displays a profile with resources, needs, members, and admin actions, fetching data and handling deletions and member management.
frontend/src/components/ResourcesNeedsVi: Shows all resources and needs with search, category filtering, and admin delete actions, linking to profile views.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the current identity, refreshing dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context and provider for managing Internet Identity login, identity persistence, and related status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for loading profiles, memberships, and display names using the app’s backend actor and Internet Identity.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind layers, theme variables, dark mode colors, and custom scrollbars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers and mounts the root component.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Implements the main dashboard view with navigation between resource, profile, exchange, event, and admin sections, handling profile loading and membership selection.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders a login screen using Internet Identity with branding and feature highlights.
frontend/src/pages/MemberJoinPage.tsx: Allows users to search organizations and submit join requests, showing status feedback and logout handling.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: Guides new users to register an organization or join one, routing to the appropriate onboarding flow.
frontend/src/pages/RegistrationPage.tsx: Implements a registration form that collects organization details, manages image upload and preview, and submits data via useRegisterProfile. Handles form validation, function selection, and optional back navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS with custom color tokens, container settings, animations, and plugins including typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Describes project state, known issues, and feature requests focused on fixing profile loading and membership resolution behavior in the frontend and backend.
